q.en: In 1845, which New York group wrote down new guidelines that became the basis of baseball?
q.zh: 1845年，纽约的哪个团体写下了后来成为棒球基础的新规则？

options.en: The Negro Leagues according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 黑人联盟（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The book says: 'In 1845, a New York group called the Knickerbockers decided to write down new guidelines for baseball.'
explain.zh: 书中说：“1845年，纽约一个名为尼克博克的团体决定为棒球写下新的准则。”

q.en: In the glossary, what is a 'league'?
q.zh: 在词汇表中，“league（联盟）”是什么？

options.en: A group of sports teams that play each other
options.zh: 彼此比赛的一群运动队

options.en: A single baseball player according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一名棒球运动员（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The glossary defines league as 'a group of sports teams that play each other (p. 5).'
explain.zh: 词汇表把 league 定义为“彼此比赛的一群运动队（第5页）”。

q.en: How many players from one team are on the field during a baseball game?
q.zh: 一场棒球比赛中，一支球队在场上共有几名球员？

explain.en: The book states: 'Nine players are on the field' and 'Each team has nine players.'
explain.zh: 书中写道：“场上有九名球员”，且“每队有九名球员”。

q.en: A baseball game is divided into how many innings?
q.zh: 一场棒球比赛分为多少局？

explain.en: The book says: 'Baseball games are divided into nine innings.'
explain.zh: 书中说：“棒球比赛分为九局。”

q.en: Who became the first African American player in the major leagues on April 15, 1947?
q.zh: 谁在1947年4月15日成为大联盟中第一位非裔美国球员？

explain.en: The book says: 'On April 15, 1947, Jackie appeared with the Dodgers as the first African American player in the majors.'
explain.zh: 书中说：“1947年4月15日，杰基代表道奇队出场，成为大联盟中第一位非裔美国球员。”

q.en: Which is the oldest major league baseball stadium in the United States?
q.zh: 美国最古老的大联盟棒球场是哪个？

explain.en: The book states: 'Fenway Park in Boston is the oldest major league baseball stadium in the United States. Fenway opened in 1912.'
explain.zh: 书中写道：“波士顿的芬威球场是美国最古老的大联盟棒球场。芬威于1912年启用。”

q.en: In the glossary, what does 'professional' mean?
q.zh: 在词汇表中，“professional（职业的）”是什么意思？

options.en: Earning money for taking part in an activity
options.zh: 因参加某项活动而赚钱

options.en: Playing only for pleasure according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 纯粹为了娱乐而玩（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The glossary defines professional as 'earning money for taking part in an activity, rather than doing it purely for pleasure (p. 5).'
explain.zh: 词汇表把 professional 定义为“因参加活动而赚钱，而非纯粹为了乐趣（第5页）”。

q.en: The All-American Girls Professional Baseball League was organized during which event?
q.zh: 全美女子职业棒球联盟是在哪一事件期间组建的？

explain.en: The book says owner Philip Wrigley organized the AAGPBL during WWII, when men went to fight and pro baseball was scarce.
explain.zh: 书中说老板菲利普·里格利在二战期间组建了AAGPBL，当时男人们去打仗，职业棒球很少。

q.en: What is the author's main purpose in writing this book?
q.zh: 作者写这本书的主要目的是什么？

options.en: To teach readers how to hit a home run according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 教读者如何打出本垒打（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: To explain the history and features of baseball
options.zh: 介绍棒球的历史与特点

explain.en: The book is an informational text covering rules, history, stadiums, and famous players, aiming to inform readers about the sport.
explain.zh: 这是一本介绍规则、历史、球场和著名球员的信息类图书，目的是向读者普及这项运动。

q.en: According to the book, baseball is played in over how many countries?
q.zh: 根据本书，棒球在多少个以上的国家开展？

options.en: Five according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 五个（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The book states: 'The sport is played in over one hundred countries, and millions of fans enjoy watching it worldwide.'
explain.zh: 书中写道：“这项运动在一百多个国家开展，全球数百万球迷喜欢观看。”

prompt.en: Using the baseball field diagram on page 6, invent a new simple game that can be played on the same field and write its rules.
prompt.zh: 参考第6页的棒球场地图，发明一种可以在同一块场地上进行的新游戏，并写下规则。

en: Keep the same diamond shape with four bases and an outfield.
Decide how a team scores and how players get 'out' so the game is clear.
zh: 保留四个垒包和外野的菱形场地。
确定得分方式和“出局”规则，让游戏清晰易懂。
